title: juncus recurvatus
intro: Juncus recurvatus, also known as bent grass or bent, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Juncaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as fight off infections. The health benefits of Juncus recurvatus include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections.
